models.name: Boxer
models.description: New design, modular interior, increased capacity, and adaptable to your needs. The new BOXER diesel van is the perfect complement to your business requirements.
keyFeatures: Usable volume up to 17 m³.
Payload capacity of up to 2,025 kg.
Best-in-class fuel economy: 11.5 km/l.
Powered by a 2.2L diesel engine with 140 hp.
Moduwork® bench seat and sliding side doors.

models.name: Peugeot Traveller
models.description: With its assertive design and connected interior, the NEW TRAVELLER brings verve and style to your day.
keyFeatures: Up to 348 km WLTP range with the 75kWh battery.
Versatile configurations for urban transport.
Generous boot volume of up to 4554 litres.
Advanced driving aids for enhanced safety.
Stylish interior design with connected infotainment.

models.name: Expert
models.description: The new PEUGEOT Expert is built to meet the needs of all business users with its renewed design and Moduwork® modular system.
keyFeatures: Best-in-class fuel economy
Payload capacity of 1,357 kg
Equipped with Cruise Control and speed limiter for reduced driver fatigue.

models.description: Discover the All-New 5008, the class-above large SUV with seven seats, stylish yet robust lines and the new PEUGEOT panoramic i-Cockpit®.
keyFeatures: Exceptional living space with flexible 7-seat configuration
New PEUGEOT panoramic i-Cockpit® with a 21'' HD curved display
Agility and manoeuvrability with a 360° field of vision and numerous driving aids

models.description: The new PEUGEOT 2008 compact SUV effortlessly redefines SUV codes with its distinctive styling, featuring new signature lights and a wide grille for a more assertive presence.
keyFeatures: Advanced Grip Control for all terrains
PEUGEOT i-Cockpit® with customizable digital display
Generous boot space of up to 1467L
Latest generation driving aids for enhanced safety
Signature 3 claw LED headlights

models.tagline: Discover the all-new 3008 with a stunning fastback SUV silhouette.
models.description: The all-new Peugeot 3008 features an innovative fastback SUV design, enhanced performance, and a next-generation panoramic i-Cockpit® that elevates driving pleasure.
keyFeatures: Fastback SUV silhouette with feline stance.
Panoramic 21'' curved display on the dash.
More than 40 driving aids for safety.
180 horsepower for enhanced performance.
Optimized aerodynamics for efficiency.

models.description: The PEUGEOT 408 combines a sleek design with advanced technology, offering a unique driving experience with a modern interior and a host of driver assistance features.
keyFeatures: Latest generation PEUGEOT i-Cockpit®.
Fully configurable i-Toggles for personalized settings.
Advanced driver assistance systems including semi-autonomous driving.
Spacious boot with a capacity of up to 536 L.
Ergonomically designed with quality materials.
